modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show strong technical proficiency. There should be a few minor typos and some irrelevant details included.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Camera controller in Colton Recital Hall not working.

full_description_text:  
So, the camera in Colton Recital Hall isn’t responding at all. We’ve got this Panasonic controller up in the booth, but it’s like it’s dead or something. Just trying to get the livestream going, but no luck. Super frustrating!
short_description: Camera controller in Colton Recital Hall not working.
description: So, the camera in Colton Recital Hall isn’t responding at all. We’ve got this Panasonic controller up in the booth, but it’s like it’s dead or something. Just trying to get the livestream going, but no luck. Super frustrating!
